qs_title: ⭐ REGENTS RUSH! — The U.S. History Quiz Show
qs_tagline: The U.S. History & Government Quiz Spectacular
qs_intro:
28 multiple-choice questions straight from the January 2026 U.S. History Regents.
Climb the money ladder to $1,000,000 · build 🔥 streaks for 2× and 3× multipliers · win trophies at 7, 14, 21 and 28 correct.
Real exam documents, photos & cartoons on screen — click any image to zoom. Two 50:50s and one Skip. 30–50 seconds a question. Keys 1–4 work.
qs_prizes:
{at:7,  emoji:'🥉', name:'THE BRONZE GAVEL', desc:'7 correct! The Founding Fathers nod approvingly. The Bronze Gavel of Justice is YOURS!'},
  {at:14, emoji:'🔔', name:'THE SILVER LIBERTY BELL', desc:'14 correct! Ring it loud — the Silver Liberty Bell joins your trophy case!'},
  {at:21, emoji:'🦅', name:'THE GOLDEN EAGLE', desc:'21 correct! Soaring like Manifest Destiny itself — the Golden Eagle is YOURS!'},
  {at:28, emoji:'🏆', name:'THE PLATINUM CONSTITUTION', desc:'A PERFECT 28/28! WE THE PEOPLE crown you champion — the Platinum Constitution trophy!'}
fc_sub: Flash cards · 37 cards from the exam
